title: Something SMP S2
description:
Contains All the mods required to play Something SMP S2.
No extra mods added.
body:
The "Something SMP S2" modpack is designed to provide players with all the essential modifications required to participate in the Something SMP server, ensuring a seamless and immersive multiplayer experience.

Key Features:

- Essential Mods Only: This modpack includes only the necessary mods mandated by the Something SMP S2 server, ensuring compatibility and optimal performance.

- Customization Flexibility: Players have the freedom to personalize their gameplay by adding any additional client-side mods of their choice to enhance their experience.

- Seamless Multiplayer Integration: By providing the required mods, this pack ensures that all players are synchronized with the server's specifications, facilitating a cohesive and enjoyable multiplayer environment.

- For further assistance or to engage with the community, please join our Discord Server.
